title: About Us
seoTitle: About Us | EcoSuds Organic Soap & Self-Care Brand Pakistan
seoDescription: Discover EcoSuds, a self-care brand for organic soaps, bath salts, bath bombs, aroma stones and shower steamers with WhatsApp ordering.

hero.title: A fresh organic self-care brand for everyday rituals.
hero.lead: EcoSuds brings organic, handmade, pure and natural product visuals, clear categories and a simple WhatsApp-first checkout into one polished online store.

brandStory.title: Organic care, soft color and a direct path to order.
brandStory.description: The EcoSuds site focuses on freshness, gifting and simple routines while keeping product claims careful. Customers see real product visuals, clear categories and easy support before placing an order.

benefits.title: Organized range
benefits.description: The store is divided into five categories so customers can quickly find their soap, soak, fizz, aroma or shower ritual.

benefits.title: Mobile-first shopping
benefits.description: Hero banners, quick actions, filters and product cards are built to stay usable on small screens.

benefits.title: Human confirmation
benefits.description: The cart prepares an order message, then availability, delivery and payment are confirmed on WhatsApp.

benefits.title: SEO-ready product pages
benefits.description: Each product has its own searchable page with structured data, clean metadata and descriptive copy.

galleryIntro.title: Product banners, soap artwork and spa-inspired category visuals.
galleryIntro.description: The presentation uses the supplied EcoSuds soap artwork across the brand and store while new category imagery can be replaced later through the CMS.
